title: Saudi Arabian-Style Vegan Burger
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegan burger inspired by the spices of Saudi Arabia. This dish is a great alternative to traditional burgers and is perfect for a quick and delicious meal.

ingredients.name: Wagyu Mushroom Patty
ingredients.notes: Made with sautéed mushrooms and spices

ingredients.name: Roasted Red Peppers
ingredients.notes: Sweet and smoky roasted red peppers

ingredients.name: Salt and Pepper
ingredients.notes: Season with salt and pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Form the Wagyu Mushroom Patty into 4 equal-sized patties.
Grill the patties for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the indulgent brioche buns on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the burgers by spreading a dollop of tahini sauce on the bottom bun, followed by a patty, some caramelized onions, roasted red peppers, and a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
Drizzle with lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Top with the top bun and serve immediately.
